Task: redesign snake_head.png for a snake skin.
Hard lock: keep shape and silhouette exactly the same as template classic-burrow (snake_head.png).
Only replace color/material/texture. Do not change contour or proportions.
Use style reference image as primary material source.

Background must be pure solid color: #00ff00.

3.  Do not use snake skin texture. Refer to the style reference image for the texture..
